footer.tagline: Enhance your experience in Stumble Guys with my platform full of accurate statistics, tools and analysis.
footer.discordBlurb: Support, website suggestions, API talk & the community.
footer.disclaimer: Please note that Stumble Labs is not endorsed by Scopely and does not reflect the opinions or views of Scopely or anyone officially involved in producing or managing Stumble Guys.

nav.discordTooltip: Support, suggestions, API talk & the community

home.title: Stumble Labs: Stumble Guys Stats, Leaderboards & Player Tracker
home.description: Track Stumble Guys players, clans and rankings with accurate live stats, leaderboards and tools.

players.title: Stumble Guys Players — Search Profiles & Stats
players.description: Search any Stumble Guys player and explore detailed profiles, wins, KOs and rank history.

hallOfFame.title: Stumble Guys Hall of Fame — Legendary Players
hallOfFame.description: The most iconic Stumble Guys players of all time, honored in the Stumble Labs Hall of Fame.

clans.title: Stumble Guys Clans — Search & Explore Clans
clans.description: Find Stumble Guys clans and view members, trophies and activity with Stumble Labs.

leaderboards.title: Stumble Guys Leaderboards — Top Players & Clans Ranked
leaderboards.description: The top Stumble Guys players and clans right now, ranked by wins, trophies and performance.

leaderboardsClans.title: Top Stumble Guys Clans — Clan Leaderboard & Rankings
leaderboardsClans.description: The strongest Stumble Guys clans ranked by members, trophies and activity.

leaderboardsPlayers.title: Top Stumble Guys Players — Global Player Leaderboard
leaderboardsPlayers.description: See the highest-ranked Stumble Guys players worldwide, with wins, KOs and detailed stats.

assets.title: Stumble Guys Assets Explorer — Skins, Emotes & More
assets.description: Browse Stumble Guys game assets — skins, emotes, animations and more — in the Stumble Labs explorer.

configMaps.title: Stumble Guys Maps — All Maps & Rotation
configMaps.description: Explore every Stumble Guys map, with details and the current rotation, on Stumble Labs.

home.heroSubtitle: Players, skins, maps and live stats — discover everything happening in the game. Built for players, creators and developers.

cards.playersText: Look up any player — profile, stats and match history.
cards.leaderboardsText: See the top ranked players and climb the ladder.
cards.skinsAssetsText: Browse every skin, emote and item in the game.
cards.clansText: Discover clans and where they stand in the rankings.

home.topRankedSubtitle: Who's leading the ranked ladder right now
home.topClansSubtitle: The most dominant clans by crowns earned

sections.moddersText: Stumble Labs offers a robust API and detailed documentation, allowing you to efficiently access and utilize game data. Whether you're looking to create mods, develop add-on tools, or better understand game mechanics, Stumble Labs provides the resources you need to expand your creations.
sections.creatorsText: If you're a streamer, YouTuber, or guide creator, Stumble Labs is your primary source for accurate statistics, map details, and game version insights. This allows you to create more informative and engaging content for your audience, always with the most up-to-date data.
sections.playersText: Even if you're a casual player, Stumble Labs offers valuable insights that can improve your gameplay. With access to player stats, detailed map information, and updates on new versions, you can level up your game and compete more effectively.

errors.playerNotFound: Player not found. Try another username.

players.browseDescription: Search for players by username. Use the search bar to find specific players instantly. If a player is not found in the autocomplete, you can add them manually.
players.startTyping: Start typing to search for players
players.modalIntro: Enter a player's exact username to add them to the tracker.

hof.title: Players Hall of Fame
hof.description: Honorable mentions for the people who helped shape Stumble Labs through the testing environment, using API keys, reporting bugs, and suggesting improvements to the API and the website. Thank you.

lb.rankedDescription: Here you can find insights about the leaderboard, such as the distribution of players across different tiers, regions and platforms and the current leaderboard.
lb.playerDistributionDescription: How the leaderboard players are spread — by their own country, their clan's server region or the platform they play on. Click a country to filter the board (click again to clear).
lb.clanDominationDescription: The clans/clubs with the most players in the ranked Top 1000 right now. Click a clan to open its page.
lb.onlineNow: {{count}} players of the leaderboard are currently online
lb.playerLeaderboardDescription: The top players ranked by total trophies or crowns. Switch the ranking metric and filter by country to browse the global board.
lb.countryDistributionDescription: How the top players are spread across countries. Click a bar to filter the board by that country.
lb.noRankedPlayers: There are no ranked players for the selected country yet.
lb.noRankedClans: There are no ranked clans for the selected region yet.
lb.clanLeaderboardDescription: The top clans ranked by total crowns or trophies. Switch the ranking metric, filter by region and browse through every clan on the board.
lb.regionDistributionDescription: How the top clans are spread across regions. Click a bar to filter the board by that region.

errors.playerLoadFailed: Failed to load the player leaderboard.
errors.clanLoadFailed: Failed to load the clan leaderboard.
errors.apiKeyMissing: Access denied: the API key is missing from the request.
errors.apiKeyInvalid: Invalid API key. Please check your access credentials.
errors.rateLimit: Rate limit reached. Please wait a moment before trying again.
errors.invalidFiltersCountry: Invalid filter values. Please adjust the sort or country.
errors.invalidFiltersRegion: Invalid filter values. Please adjust the sort or region.
errors.playerRetry: Could not load the player leaderboard. Please try again.
errors.clanRetry: Could not load the clan leaderboard. Please try again.

clans.browseDescription: Search for clans by name. Use the search bar to find specific clans and view their details, members and stats.
clans.recommendedClans: Recommended Clans - Just Some, use the search above to find more
clans.startTypingSpecific: Start typing above to search for a specific clan
clans.startTyping: Start typing to search for clans

overview.evolutionIntro: We capture periodic snapshots of this clan — accumulated XP grows over time.
overview.capNote: A clan's XP reaches at most 60K per season (resets each season) — this one is at {{percent}}% of the cap.
overview.collectingData: Still collecting data for this clan
overview.xpTrackedPerSeasonHint: Each member's XP contribution is recorded per season — click to see the timeline.

clanDetails.milestoneReached: This clan has reached {{milestone}} ({{xp}} XP) — {{reached}} of {{total}} milestones.
clanDetails.noMilestones: No milestones reached yet. Current clan XP: {{xp}}.
clanDetails.trackHint: Scroll the track — spacing keeps milestones readable; pin position matches clan XP between rewards.
clanDetails.tryAnotherName: Try another name or clear filters.
clanDetails.historyDescription: Joins, leaves, and role changes tracked by Stumble Labs.
clanDetails.noHistoryText: No joins, leaves or role changes have been recorded for this clan yet.
clanDetails.evolutionDescription: Snapshots over time — XP, roster size, streak, and aggregates.
clanDetails.chartSampled: Chart shows up to {{max}} sampled points from this page ({{loaded}} loaded).
clanDetails.noTrackedXp: No tracked XP this season yet
clanDetails.trackingStartedLate: Tracking started after this season began — totals may be incomplete.

errors.loadError: An error occurred while loading map information

assets.browseDescription: Filter assets by version, rarity, or category to narrow your results. Use the search bar to find specific assets by name or ID instantly.
assets.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, ID or category...

errors.loadError: An error occurred while loading the asset information
errors.viewerNotFound: FBX viewer container not found. Please ensure the 3D viewer modal is visible.

profile.notFoundText: We couldn't find a player with ID {{id}}. The account may not exist, or its profile isn't available right now.
profile.loadErrorText: We couldn't load this profile right now. This is usually temporary — give it another try in a moment.
profile.outdatedData: This profile data may be outdated.

pills.rankedMeta: Based on leaderboard snapshots when this player appears.
pills.inventoryMeta: Data provided by StumbleLabs inventory tracker service.
pills.mapsMeta: Custom maps seen by the StumbleLabs custom UGC maps tracker service.

profile.inventoryIntro: This inventory data is obtained from an external inventory scanner service for players.
profile.inventorySearchHint: You can search for skins or emotes by their ID or name below.
profile.inventorySearchPlaceholder: Search by ID or friendly name...
profile.inventoryEmpty: This user's inventory is empty or not available.
profile.noItemsMatch: No inventory items match your search criteria.
profile.ugcDeprecatedTitle: UGC Maps was deprecated in Stumble Guys.
profile.ugcDeprecatedText: The ability to create custom maps has been removed from the game. The data below is kept for historical reference only and is no longer updated.
profile.createdMapsDescription: This maps data is obtained from an external service that tracks player-created maps (UGC).
profile.noMapsYet: Maybe this user hasn't created any maps yet.
profile.usernameHistoryDescription: Previous usernames observed for this player, most recent first.
profile.noPreviousNames: No previous names have been recorded for this player.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load your card. Are you signed in?
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Sign in again to save.

badges.ugcVerifiedDesc: Verified UGC Creator - recognized by the game as a creator of official community maps
badges.stumbleStarDesc: Stumble Star - special account with extra in-game privileges
badges.verifiedProfile: Verified profile - claimed by its owner
badges.hofTooltip: Hall of Fame - honored for early contributions to the Stumble Labs API or Website

shareCard.exportHint: Image is exported at 1200×630 (Open Graph standard).

status.clipboardUnsupported: Clipboard not supported in this browser. Use Download instead.
status.renderFailed: Failed to render card. Try a different template or theme.

rankedSection.noRankedHistory: This user doesn't have ranked history data.
rankedSection.topRankHold: Top rank + last tier reached. Hold the ceiling until season end.
rankedSection.netSwing: Net RP swing across calendar days.
rankedSection.boostTitle: Early-season boost for players ranked last season — consumed in the first matches, not a permanent multiplier
rankedSection.pointChangeText: RP gained or lost in each match based on where you finish in your {{rank}} lobby.
rankedSection.allUnlocked: All tier rewards unlocked for this rank.
rankedSection.ratingActivityDesc: Bars: RP gained/lost per period. Line: score at the end of each period. Follows the filters above.
rankedSection.streakAnalysisDesc: Each bar is one play session: net RP from the first to the last match of that session.
rankedSection.activityByHourDesc: Matches by hour of day (your local time), added up across the whole filtered period, shows when this player usually plays, not a chronological timeline.
rankedSection.positionDistDesc: How this player's matches split by inferred finish position, derived from each match's RP change against the division's point table at that moment. RP jumps covering several games show as Multi-game.
rankedSection.weeklyHeatmapDesc: Matches by day of week and hour (your local time) across the entire selected season, stronger color means more matches. Ignores the time-range filter: a habit profile needs the full season.
rankedSection.noMatchesSeason: No matches found for this season.

encounters.trackedNote: Encounters are inferred from score changes in the same collection window (~30s) — they can be rivals or party mates, and occasionally players from another lobby. Only players who passed through the top-1000 during this season are tracked.
encounters.noOpponents: No tracked encounters for this season yet.
encounters.encountersNote: Encounters only show for players who reached the top-1000 at the same time as this profile.

classicTournaments.description: Historical Stumble Guys brackets hosted on Tournament SDK, winner archives indexed by StumbleLabs.
classicTournaments.partnerBlurb: Official partner stack for ranked and community tournaments with Stumble Guys. Data shown here is archived results.
classicTournaments.withPlacement: {{n}} with your placement on this page
classicTournaments.noRowsMatched: This profile has no classic tournament rows matched in the StumbleLabs index.
classicTournaments.allowedVsBlocked: Allowed vs blocked for this bracket.
classicTournaments.internalId: Internal ID (no friendly name in archive)
